prompt: Maintainer sprint: implement local telemetry recorder slice for end-to-end-loop after local/privacy-safe telemetry spec.
commands_or_evidence: Added scripts/telemetry_record.py as stdlib-only opt-in local JSONL recorder.
JSONL fixture parse -> jsonl ok: 6 lines
Recorder smoke into /tmp/e2e-loop-telemetry-test.jsonl -> telemetry recorder smoke ok: 4 events
python3 scripts/validate_skill.py /tmp/end-to-end-loop-validate/end-to-end-loop -> end-to-end-loop skill validation passed

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Recorder is opt-in and local-only by default.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: scripts/telemetry_record.py only runs when invoked and defaults to .end-to-end-loop/telemetry.local.jsonl or explicit E2E_LOOP_TELEMETRY_PATH/--telemetry-path.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Recorder captures command duration and exit code without raw command/stdout/stderr.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: wrap smoke produced command/resource events; forbidden-key check rejected prompt/stdout/stderr/env/cwd/command/args/identity fields.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Repo validator recognizes and checks telemetry recorder requirements.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: scripts/validate_skill.py now requires scripts/telemetry_record.py and checks recorder privacy/recording terms; temp basename validator passed.

learning_candidates.text: Telemetry recorder is opt-in stdlib local JSONL; wrap records class/duration/exit/resource only, not raw output or command text.
learning_candidates.reason: Durable feature behavior and privacy rule.

learning_candidates.text: Smoke telemetry recorder with --telemetry-path /tmp/... run-start, wrap --cmd-class validator -- <safe command>, run-end, then parse JSONL.

copilot_findings.summary: gh authenticated; no PR/code-review surface for this branch before push and no new Copilot tooling installation approved, so no Copilot findings were collected.

notes: Recorder slice completed locally; branch CI expected only after push/PR.
